location: Purchased from Twin Maiden Husks at Roundtable Hold for 1,000 Runes — available as soon as you first reach the Hold, no fight required.
tactics: Straight gold purchase from Twin Maiden Husks' shop — no combat involved
Its guard-while-thrusting property lets you attack with it even while holding a shield up, so it pairs naturally with a shield-and-Dex playstyle
Purely thrust-only (no cutting-edge moveset), so it isn't a great pick if you want slashing attacks too
lore: A slender, needle-sharp blade built purely for thrusting. It's slim enough to stab with even while a shield is raised, making it a natural partner for a defensive off-hand.

builds.name: Sword-and-board Dex
builds.why: The guard-while-thrusting property makes it one of the few thrusting swords that stays useful behind a shield, fitting a defensive Dexterity build.

builds.name: Riposte/critical Dex build
builds.why: One of the highest critical-hit modifiers among thrusting swords, and Keen affinity pushes its Dexterity scaling especially high, rewarding backstab- and riposte-focused play.
